title: helichrysum monogynum
intro: Helichrysum monogynum, also known as yellow milk thistle or elephant head, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Helichrysum monogynum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy practices.
